how is water formed: Water (H₂O) forms when two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom chemically bond, typically triggered by heat or energy, and this reaction occurs continuously in nature through atmospheric and chemical processes.
15dmcubed of a gasseous hydrocarbon x wa: In combustion analysis using gas volumes, KOH absorbs CO₂ gas, allowing you to quantify the carbon in a hydrocarbon by measuring the volume reduction after its addition.
